scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agentos/api" "npm run dev -w @agentos/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentos/shared && npm run build -w @agentos/api && npm run build -w @agentos/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @agentos/api && npm run lint -w @agentos/web
